textByHashes.575ff2e673991b749701546e41f29e66591b6466: Well, what do we have e're? Another laddie lookin' fer old Kellan's deep sea trawlin' expertise?
textByHashes.75bfac37f388d1e7ca4509cf6421603a2806f473: Well, trawlin's the art of catchin' fish with yer boat. It's the best way to harvest the highest quality fish o' the sea. If ye' be wantin' to learn more, I can tell ye' all ye' need t' know.
textByHashes.10bed6dff631fabb808ac5fdef8ee1c42c0ad341: The name's Kellan. Used to be a daft-hand at trawlin' back in m'day before the muscles began achin' and the bones started creakin'. These days are better spent helpin you young'uns get yer foot in the trade.
textByHashes.02e74450024474e231dabb71891d9f99bed61c71: Well, it all starts with you buildin' a good ol' trawlin' net on yer boat. Rope will do, but linen, hemp and cotton are preferred. The better ye' net, the deeper ye'll be able t' lower it.
textByHashes.4e7d8e01ceebe09c32aadd4248562e351481014c: After ye' got a net, ye' need t' find a shoal out at sea. In mos' cases, different shoals 'ave different fish, so make sure yer lookin' for the one ye' want.
textByHashes.c72f6411f29e250821c6a7c7176f90dc000271cf: Once ye' find a shoal, it'll probably be on t' move. They travel o'er pretty large distances, but ye'll find 'em stoppin' from time t' time. Once they stop, that be when it's time t' start catchin'.
textByHashes.04646de8bca21f4f85ebcce657b097f65d891137: Aye, exactly. However, it's important for ye' to know that different shoals be at different depths, and plen'y of shoals will be swimmin' up and down as well.
textByHashes.e2293d724045934503ecff435b905b15c1644946: Yer gonna need t' lower the net to the same depth as the shoal, but remember, if the shoal is too deep and yer net ain't up to scratch, yer gonna be all outta luck.
textByHashes.3facadb85fb40d6736eb628ffbce4c5f6ae4f07d: If yer wantin' to catch plenty o' fish from a shoal, then yer gonna 'ave to bait it. Best time t' do that is just after it's stopped. For the bait, ye'll be needing lots o' fish offcuts.
textByHashes.e9ae6373f78bb8d0b937e7c6ef8ed235b3d65826: Ye' can get some offcuts by cuttin' up any kind o' fish, but fancier fish like shark an' such will give ye' higher quality ones.
textByHashes.24276f6c6714d307d6ef5e7f5fa152f62b48aa6c: Well, sort of, but ye'll need t' proper equipment to do it. Specifically, ye'll want to build a chum station on yer boat. They're what ye' use to spread t' offcuts.
textByHashes.6edffd8c7c635dbc1131c61a2cbf4e1471d5138b: Finally, don't forget that shoals travel o'er big distances. If ye' don't feel the shoals in ye' bones, ye' can build a fathom stone on yer boat. They can help ye' track down a shoals whereabouts.
textByHashes.95192a524b20f4aeaa206c8cbfd6bd09323e148d: Well, if trawlin's not yer style, laddie, ye' can always cast a rod o'er the side o' the boat and pray they be nibblin', but it's less effective than nets are an' it burns through yer' supply o' bait.
textByHashes.43dbf40a37657c6136ba8f26ec2f35b9c3d19d82: Ye' can do it wherever ye' can find a shoal. They're all across the ocean and yer got different ones fer different fish. I can tell ye' some good places t' find specific ones.
textByHashes.57bf9ab8dfb068fc223bc8803c75fd57c438e3f3: First up, krill an' haddock are the best shoals for gettin' started. There be a great spot for krill just west o' here in the Great Sound.
textByHashes.4f7a56ebff3e4fba86d7c0603e1754d1a38a9f2f: Ye' can also find both krill an' haddock down in t' Unquiet Ocean, around places like Red Rock, the Great Conch and t' like.
textByHashes.dfb869170d332ac4f9237cd6781fbb483bdc016c: Next ye' got yellowfin an' halibut. There be plen'y o' yellowfin in the Shrouded Ocean, such as near Deepfin Point. Halibut are extra easy! Ye' can find 'em right outside this here port!
textByHashes.420c2a5eebef011e3ada305af78fdd0c260f99d1: Bluefin are more scattered. Ye' can't really pin 'em down, but I'd try farther south near the waters full of tangled kelp.
textByHashes.fde39b4c13461735f186c1dfbf95ecbe5ea3c967: And then ye' got marlin. They can only be found in the' frigid Northern Ocean, but only the best o' boats can survive up there.
textByHashes.4192bb92997a79a15c9e476eb14d8d9c49c0fc6e: If yer put off by some o' the risks, ye' can try to get lucky. Shoals like t' migrate, an' sometimes them rarer fish mix and mingle with t' other shoals.
textByHashes.d8453ceeec4786e6406765a75e1118947670402f: Well, there's giant krill, haddock, yellowfin, halibut, bluefin, and if yer up fer a challenge, the elusive marlin.
textByHashes.5409f88ac3b4dd1b5569200b393cbf1ebbb47f4b: These ain't yer normal brand o' fish either. Some say that these are the tastiest fish ye' can get. Some even provide unique effects when ye' eat 'em!
textByHashes.706a3d8ee5bf15bb88a525dd989d57f2990042d0: I'm sure ol' Kellan can think o' some stuff t' help ye' on yer trawlin' adventures, laddie.
textByHashes.faf178c2b4df890b80d93b28ddfeec1bb3664537: First, ye'll want t' get yer hands on some sturdy fish crates t' hold more fish. Skilled craftsmen can make empty crates out o' camphor logs then ye' pack em full o' ice. Them slayer masters often have ice fer sale.
textByHashes.c36e3629ef39697d9de74215afd8aba0db0d1201: Second, trawlin' is always better with a good crew by yer side to delegate up the workload. If ye' go it alone, ye'll be trying to man both t' net and chum station at t' same time!
textByHashes.54e5d454ea452205ff9e7d9605ba9147a251dbfe: Third, remember that them rarer shoals don't just stay at one depth. Yer gonna find 'em swimmin' up and down. Ye' gotta pay attention and make sure yer net matches their depth.
textByHashes.180de3cdb352ce22dc0b58a6718b7c09ad23cd41: Finally, don't be forgettin' to bait the shoal when it stops! It'll attract more fish to yer' boat.
